title: Database Design Assignment
short_description: Translate business requirements into an ER model and relational schema with keys and constraints.

title: SQL KPI Queries
short_description: Write SQL queries using GROUP BY, JOINs, and aggregate functions to compute business KPIs from a multi-table relational database.

title: Cruise Line Database Group Project
short_description: Design and implement a multi-table relational database for a cruise line, including Power Query ETL and Power BI dashboard for managerial insights.

title: Assignment 2 — kNN and Clustering (Ames Housing + Telco)
short_description: Apply kNN regression to Ames Housing data and kNN classification to Telco churn data. Includes grid search with cross-validation for k selection and K-means clustering.

title: Assignment 3 — Tree and Ensemble Methods
short_description: Compare CART, bagging, random forest, and boosting (GBM, XGBoost) on classification and regression tasks. Evaluate using bootstrap OOB and k-fold CV.

title: Assignment 4 — Deep Learning (CNN, RNN, LSTM)
short_description: Build and train neural networks for sequential and image data using Keras/PyTorch. Includes CNNs, RNNs, and LSTMs with gradient descent variants.

title: Assignment 5 — NLP and Transformers
short_description: Apply word2vec embeddings and fine-tune a Hugging Face transformer model for text classification or sentiment analysis.

title: MBAN 5560 Final Project
short_description: End-to-end ML project applying the full toolkit: EDA, model selection, validation, and business interpretation.

title: Assignment 2 — LP Formulation (RRB Watercraft)
short_description: Formulate and solve a linear programming problem for watercraft production planning. Includes sensitivity analysis and shadow price interpretation.

title: Assignment 3 — Integer Programming
short_description: Formulate and solve IP models for knapsack, assignment, and transshipment problems using Gurobi and Excel Solver.

title: Assignment 5 — Decision Analysis
short_description: Solve decision problems under uncertainty using EMV, EVPI, and utility theory. Build decision trees and evaluate Bayesian information updates.

title: Looms of Ladakh Optimization
short_description: Multi-objective LP optimization for a textile manufacturer balancing production volume, resource constraints, and fairness considerations.

title: Empirical Analytics Assignment 1 — Monte Carlo and Financial Statements
short_description: Build an @RISK Monte Carlo simulation of a financial scenario and a dynamic 3-statement financial model in Excel.

title: Empirical Analytics Assignment 2 — Valuation and Decision Trees
short_description: Build a DCF valuation model and use Precision Tree for decision modelling under uncertainty.

title: Empirical Analytics Assignment 3 — NLP and ML on Financial Data
short_description: Apply NLP sentiment analysis to financial text and ML forecasting to time series data using Python on WRDS data.
methods: NLP sentiment analysis on capital market data

title: Empirical Analytics Assignment 4 — Event Study
short_description: Conduct a capital market event study to measure abnormal returns around a corporate event.

title: Equity Research White Paper
short_description: Produce a professional equity research report with buy/hold/sell recommendation using traditional analysis, AI-assisted tools, and critical evaluation of AI outputs.

title: Agentic AI Component
short_description: Design and implement an LLM-powered agent using LangChain and LangGraph with HITL control, middleware, and LangSmith monitoring.

title: NS Health White Paper (Open Data)
short_description: Research white paper on Nova Scotia Health open data — research question formulation, data cleaning, methodology, peer evaluation, and public utility framing.

title: Halifax Tides Live Case
short_description: Live case applying agentic AI and analytics to a real-world problem in the Halifax context.

title: Regression Analysis Project
short_description: Build and evaluate a multiple linear regression model for a business prediction problem. Includes significance testing, train-test split, and prediction intervals.

title: Lingras Quizzes
short_description: Four periodic quizzes covering regression theory, statistical inference, and model evaluation.

title: Addressing Bias Essay and Video Reflection
short_description: Essay + video reflection defending an uncomfortable position, then analyzing own motivated reasoning. Applies ethics frameworks to AI bias scenarios.

title: Hands-on Labs
short_description: Weekly hands-on labs covering Python scripting, OOP, pandas data wrangling, and linear regression in Python.

title: Forecasting Web Experiment
short_description: Build a Flask-based web experiment system for collecting forecasting decisions and analyzing demand for operational management research.

title: Group Project — Kremer Replication
short_description: Replicate Kremer's operational management experiment in Python, demonstrating experimental replication methodology and supply chain analytics.
